gw.photosIntro: Selected impressions of material, detail and craftsmanship.

badsanierung.title:
Calculate a
bathroom renovation.
badsanierung.lede: From a modern guest WC to an exclusive complete bathroom: configure your renovation and get transparent costs for plumbing, tiling and fixtures.

kueche.title:
Calculate kitchens
& cabinetry.
kueche.lede: Kitchen run, worktop, sink, floor, ceiling, electrics or water connection: choose the right variant and get an initial preliminary estimate.

boeden.title:
Calculate floors
& coverings.
boeden.lede: Parquet, laminate, vinyl, tiles, cork or screed: choose the right flooring and get an initial preliminary estimate.
boeden.endTitle:
We check the subfloor
and transitions on site.

elektro.title:
Calculate electrical
installation.
elektro.lede: New installation, consumer unit, network, lighting, smart home, blind control or intercom: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
elektro.endTitle:
We check the cable routes
and distribution boards on site.

trockenbau.title:
Calculate
drywall.
trockenbau.lede: Suspended ceilings, new walls, wall cladding, laying screed or fitting out roof slopes: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.

maler.title:
Calculate painting
& decorating.
maler.lede: Painting, skimming, wallpapering, wooden ceilings, radiators, windows, doors or façade coating: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
maler.endTitle:
We check the substrate
and colour system on site.

fassade.title:
Calculate façades
& insulation.
fassade.lede: Insulation, coating, wood cladding, plinth insulation, brick slips or curtain wall: choose the right façade service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
fassade.endTitle:
We check the substrate
and connections on site.

abdichtung.title:
Calculate
waterproofing.
abdichtung.lede: Horizontal damp proofing, perimeter waterproofing or basement waterproofing: choose the right waterproofing technique and get an initial preliminary estimate.
abdichtung.endTitle:
We check the cause
and waterproofing system on site.

dach.title:
Calculate roof
& fit-out.
dach.lede: From a new roof structure and roof covering to interior fit-out or insulation: calculate the costs for your roof project.
dach.endTitle:
We check the condition
and options on site.

treppen.title:
Calculate stairs
& railings.
treppen.lede: Wooden stairs, concrete stairs, stairwell opening, railings, outdoor, space-saving or spiral stairs: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
treppen.endTitle:
We check the measurements
and connections on site.

garten.title:
Calculate garden
& outdoor areas.
garten.lede: Terraces, garden walls, lighting, carport, garden house, raised beds, water management, fence or canopy: choose the right outdoor service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
garten.endTitle:
We check the ground
and drainage on site.

barrierefreiheit.title:
Calculate
accessibility.
barrierefreiheit.lede: Floor-level shower, accessible WC, roll-under washbasin, grab rails and non-slip surfaces: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
barrierefreiheit.endTitle:
We check the movement areas
and connections on site.

fenster.title:
Calculate
windows.
fenster.lede: Aluminium, wood or PVC windows, balcony and patio doors, roof windows, roller shutters, awnings or window refurbishment: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
fenster.endTitle:
We check the measurements
and connections on site.

rohbau.title:
Calculate the
shell.
rohbau.lede: Demolition, foundation, masonry, floor slabs or a complete shell: choose the right service and get an initial preliminary estimate.
rohbau.endTitle:
We coordinate shell
and demolition from a single source.

tueren.title:
Calculate
doors.
tueren.lede: Internal doors, front door, sliding doors or side entrance: choose the right type of door and get an initial preliminary estimate.

wasser.title:
Calculate
water.
wasser.lede: Bathroom, kitchen, basement or outdoors: choose the right plumbing riser and get an initial preliminary estimate.
wasser.endTitle:
We coordinate drinking
and waste water from a single source.

zaeune.title:
Calculate
fences.
zaeune.lede: Twin-mesh, wood, privacy screen or chain-link: choose the right type of fence and get an initial preliminary estimate.

pakete.title:
Four routes
to a finished
space.
pakete.lede: Turn rooms into places with presence: worry-free complete renovation for houses, apartments, hospitality and offices — site management and all materials included.
pakete.quote: You pay one price, see one date, talk to one person — from the first phone call to the handover of keys.

haus.title:
House
renovation.
haus.lede: Full renovation of existing buildings — from the roof to the driveway. For detached houses, apartment buildings and terraced houses up to 480 m².

wohnung.title:
Apartment
renovation.
wohnung.lede: Renovate city apartments modularly: bathrooms, kitchens, floors, wiring, heating — liveable in 6 to 10 weeks. Also for tenanted units.

gastro.title:
Restaurant
fit-out.
gastro.lede: Restaurants, bars and hotels — from concept to opening night. We build turnkey and prepare you for the health authority inspection.

buero.title:
Office
fit-out.
buero.lede: Offices, practices and workspaces — from reception and meeting rooms to the kitchenette, acoustics and lighting. We coordinate fit-out, services and finishes from a single source.

compare.title: Which package suits your project?
compare.intro: The answer almost always comes down to two questions: do you live there yourself? And how extensive is the work? The values below are our median figures from 412 projects.

gewerke.title:
Nineteen
trades,
one hand.
gewerke.lede: Discover individual products, building materials and complete packages for every trade — coordinated by our site management in Frankfurt and Emmenbrücke.

featured.title:
Three trades that carry
almost every project.
featured.intro: Whether a full renovation or a one-off job — three disciplines feature in every second commission. With our own teams for bathrooms, kitchens and floors.

bad.desc: Complete bathrooms from 4 to 28 m². Tiling, plumbing, radiators, lighting — from a single order.

kueche.desc: Bespoke joinery kitchens and fitted units.

boden.desc: Parquet, vinyl, natural stone, screed, industrial flooring.

index.title:
The complete
directory.
index.intro: Tap a trade to open the cost calculator — on desktop, hovering is enough for a preview. Each trade is coordinated by its own site management — book them individually or bundled.

process.title:
From the call to
a turnkey handover.
process.intro: Four stages — each with a fixed point of contact, a fixed date and a written fixed price. No hourly billing, no hand-offs between subcontractors.

1.label: First conversation
1.title: On-site survey
1.desc: An appointment within 48 hours. We measure, listen and sketch rough options.

2.label: Fixed price
2.title: Binding quote
2.desc: Within 14 days you receive a fixed-price quote with a completion date.

3.label: Build phase
3.title: One site management
3.desc: Weekly status, one point of contact, all trades under contract.

4.label: Handover
4.title: Acceptance & care
4.desc: Handover of keys, a care guide, 5 years' workmanship warranty — and you're in.

heizmethoden.title:
Modern
heating methods.
Seven ways.
heizmethoden.lede: Ready for the future? From hydraulic balancing of an existing system to a grant-eligible air-source heat pump — we plan, supply and install. Including siting assessments and BAFA and KfW funding applications.
heizmethoden.overviewLede: Which heating technology really suits your property depends on insulation standard, hydraulics and the existing connections. Below are our seven most common systems — each of which we plan, install and commission.
heizmethoden.footText: We check BAFA and KfW funding for you free of charge. Energy consulting on request before the contract is signed.

heizkoerper.title: Radiators
heizkoerper.desc: Classic and efficient. Replacement, adaptation to new heating technology, painting and cladding — including hydraulic balancing.

heizstraenge.title: Heating risers
heizstraenge.desc: Complete renewal of the riser and distribution pipes in apartment buildings — coordinated floor by floor, with dust control.

fussboden.title: Underfloor heating
fussboden.subtitle: Surface heating
fussboden.desc: Water-based or electric — in new builds, renovations and retrofitted into existing buildings. Compatible with parquet, tiles and exposed screed.

waermepumpe.title: Air-source heat pump
waermepumpe.desc: A grant-eligible heat source for well-insulated homes. Sizing, siting plans, acoustic assessment and commissioning from a single source.

gas.title: Gas heating
gas.subtitle: Condensing
gas.desc: Where a gas connection exists, a safe bridging technology — modern condensing boilers with high efficiency, ready for hydrogen blending.

pellet.title: Pellet stove
pellet.desc: Wood pellets as a CO₂-neutral alternative — as central heating with a buffer tank or as a single-room heater in the living area.

thermen.title: Prestige sauna heater
thermen.subtitle: Heaters & stoves
thermen.desc: A luxury 9 kW sauna heater, material sampling and an optional flue system — for private saunas and wellness areas.
